senses.definition: (of a woman) plump or full-figured body, often highlighting voluptuous curves and a more ample physique

examples.x: The actress embraced her Rubenesque figure and refused to conform to Hollywood's unrealistic standards of beauty.
In art history class, we learned about the portrayal of Rubenesque women in Baroque paintings.
The fashion industry is beginning to recognize the beauty of Rubenesque models, featuring them in prominent campaigns.
Her Rubenesque curves were celebrated by admirers who appreciated her voluptuous physique.
The artist's latest collection of paintings featured Rubenesque women as a celebration of diverse body types.

senses.definition: having extra body weight

examples.x: Despite her well-padded frame, she exuded confidence and charisma wherever she went.
The well-padded man struggled to keep up with his more athletic friends during the hike.
The well-padded cushions on the sofa made it incredibly comfortable for lounging.
Her well-padded cheeks gave her a youthful appearance, making her look younger than her age.
The well-padded cat lazed contentedly in the sunbeam streaming through the window.

senses.definition: describing a woman with a full, rounded, and attractive figure, often with a pleasing emphasis on curves and ample proportions

examples.x: The Renaissance paintings often depicted women with buxom figures, celebrating the ideal of voluptuous beauty.
The actress captivated the audience with her buxom charm, turning heads on the red carpet.
The fashion designer's collection celebrated diverse body shapes, featuring styles that complemented both slender and buxom figures.
The historical novels often describe women in elaborate gowns, showcasing their buxom elegance during formal events.
The vintage Hollywood stars, known for their buxom beauty, set the standard for glamour and sophistication.

senses.definition: slightly fat or chubby, especially in a cute or endearing way

examples.x: She tried to hide her pudgy fingers during the piano recital.

senses.definition: (of a person) loose and covered with soft flesh

examples.x: After months of inactivity, his once-toned muscles had become flabby.
She felt self-conscious about her flabby arms and decided to start working out regularly.
His doctor warned him about the health risks associated with having a flabby midsection.
Despite her best efforts, she struggled to tone her flabby thighs through exercise alone.
The weight loss program helped him shed excess fat and firm up his flabby stomach.

senses.definition: (of a woman) having large breasts, wide hips and a narrow waist

examples.x: The curvaceous actress sashayed down the red carpet, turning heads with her hourglass figure.
Despite societal pressure to be thin, she embraced her curvaceous body with confidence.
The curvaceous model was featured on magazine covers for her stunning physique.
Her curvaceous silhouette was accentuated by the form-fitting gown she wore.
The curvaceous dancer moved with grace and fluidity, captivating the audience.

senses.definition: large and muscular, with a strong and solid build

examples.x: The husky firefighter effortlessly lifted the heavy equipment during the rescue operation.
The husky man easily pushed the stalled car to the side of the road.
The husky coach led the team with both strength and compassion.
The husky bartender managed the rowdy crowd with a firm hand.
The husky delivery man carried multiple heavy packages without breaking a sweat.

senses.definition: (of a person) short and fat

examples.x: The tubby man struggled to fit into the narrow seat on the bus.
The tubby toddler toddled around the playground with chubby cheeks and a happy smile.
Despite being young, he was already tubby, with a round belly that protruded over his belt.
The tubby puppy waddled across the yard, its pudgy tail wagging excitedly.
The tubby cat enjoyed lounging in the sun, its round body sprawled lazily on the windowsill.

senses.definition: (especially of a man) having a short but quite solid figure with thick muscles

examples.x: The stocky wrestler easily lifted his opponents off the ground.
Despite his height, he had a stocky build that made him stand out on the football field.
The stocky construction worker effortlessly carried heavy loads at the job site.
His stocky frame made it difficult to find clothes that fit well off the rack.
Despite his stocky stature, he moved with surprising agility on the basketball court.

senses.definition: (of a woman) elegant and slender in built

examples.x: The svelte actress captivated audiences with her elegant appearance on the red carpet.
Despite her age, she maintained a svelte figure through yoga and healthy eating.
The svelte dancer moved with grace and precision across the stage.
He admired her svelte silhouette as she walked confidently down the street.
Despite his busy schedule, he made time for regular exercise to stay svelte and fit.

senses.definition: (of a person) tall and thin in a way that is not graceful

examples.x: As he grew taller, his lanky limbs seemed to be out of proportion with the rest of his body.
Despite his height, his lanky frame gave him an awkward appearance on the basketball court.
She often felt self-conscious about her lanky figure, wishing she had a more athletic physique.
The actor's lanky appearance and unique features made him stand out in auditions for unusual roles.
The lanky teenager struggled to find clothes that fit well due to his long and slender build.

senses.definition: having a lean and strong body

examples.x: The wiry gymnast executed intricate routines with grace and precision, showcasing his strength and flexibility.
Despite his wiry frame, he possessed surprising power and endurance on the hiking trail.
Her wiry build allowed her to slip through tight spaces with ease during the obstacle course.
The wiry boxer relied on speed and agility rather than brute force to outmaneuver his opponents in the ring.
His wiry muscles rippled beneath his skin as he effortlessly climbed the steep rock face.

senses.definition: having a tall, slim, and delicate physical appearance

examples.x: She moved across the dance floor with sylphlike grace, captivating everyone with her fluid movements.
The ballerina's sylphlike figure lent an ethereal quality to her performances on stage.
Her sylphlike beauty and poise made her the perfect choice for the lead role in the romantic film.
The model's sylphlike physique was ideal for showcasing the latest haute couture designs.
With her sylphlike form and radiant smile, she resembled a modern-day nymph frolicking in the meadow.

senses.definition: tall, slender, and elegant, with long, thin limbs

examples.x: Her willowy figure and elegant posture made her stand out in a crowd.

senses.definition: long, thin, and frail in appearance

examples.x: As the spider crawled across the wall, its spindly legs left delicate traces of silk.
The newborn foal struggled to stand on its spindly legs, testing its newfound mobility.
His spindly fingers struggled to grasp the small objects due to their thin and fragile nature.
The ballerina's spindly arms moved gracefully through the air as she performed the elegant dance routine.
Despite his spindly appearance, the wiry athlete proved to be surprisingly strong and agile on the field.

senses.definition: thin and bony in a way that is not pleasant

examples.x: Despite his appetite, he remained scrawny, unable to put on weight.
The scrawny stray cat begged for food outside the cafe.
The scrawny boy was often teased by his classmates for his frail appearance.
She wore oversized clothes to hide her scrawny arms and legs.
The scrawny dog whimpered as it searched for scraps of food in the alley.

senses.definition: looking thin, pale, or exhausted due to prolonged period of suffering, anxiety, or starvation

examples.x: The refugees were found in an emaciated state after weeks without food or water.
The emaciated stray dog sought shelter under the abandoned building.
After months of chemotherapy, she emerged from treatment looking emaciated but hopeful.
The emaciated horse was rescued from neglect and given proper care.
The emaciated man's sunken eyes betrayed the depth of his suffering.

senses.definition: tall, thin, and awkward in appearance or movement

examples.x: As a teenager, he was tall and gangly, with arms and legs that seemed too long for his body.
The gangly teenager tripped over his own feet as he tried to navigate the crowded hallway.
Despite his gangly appearance, he possessed a surprising amount of agility on the basketball court.
The gangly foal struggled to find its balance as it took its first wobbly steps.
She felt self-conscious about her gangly frame, especially when surrounded by petite friends.

senses.definition: very thin or pale in a way that is suggestive of an illness

examples.x: The patient's cadaverous appearance alarmed the doctors, indicating severe malnutrition.
After weeks of fever, he emerged from his sickbed looking pale and cadaverous.
The actor underwent a drastic weight loss regimen to portray the cadaverous character accurately.
The homeless man's cadaverous face revealed years of hardship and struggle.
The ghost in the movie was depicted as a cadaverous figure, with sunken eyes and hollow cheeks.

senses.definition: (of a person) physically strong with well-developed muscles

examples.x: The brawny construction worker effortlessly lifted heavy beams and carried them across the site.
His brawny arms and broad shoulders hinted at the physical strength he possessed.
The brawny wrestler dominated his opponents with his sheer power and imposing stature.
Despite his brawny appearance, he had a gentle demeanor and a kind heart.
The brawny firefighter rushed into the burning building to rescue trapped occupants.

senses.definition: having a lean and muscular physique, characterized by strength and agility
(especially of a woman) beautiful, with a tall elegant figure

examples.x: The statuesque actress commanded attention on the red carpet with her tall, elegant figure.
Her statuesque beauty captivated everyone in the room as she entered.
The statuesque model effortlessly showcased designer clothing on the runway.
The statuesque figure of the goddess in the painting symbolized grace and power.
His statuesque build and chiseled features earned him a spot as one of the most sought-after male models in the industry.

senses.definition: strongly built and muscular, with a large and robust physique

examples.x: The burly bouncer stood at the door, his imposing presence deterring troublemakers from entering the club.
Despite his gentle demeanor, the burly lumberjack had the strength to fell trees with a single swing of his axe.
The burly construction worker effortlessly lifted heavy bags of cement and carried them across the site.
His burly frame made him well-suited for the physically demanding job of moving furniture.
The burly football player towered over his opponents on the field, intimidating them with his size and strength.

senses.definition: tall, strong, and well-built, often implying an impressive physical appearance

examples.x: Her parents were relieved to see their once frail daughter grow into a strapping young woman.

senses.definition: possessing a lot of physical strength

examples.x: The stalwart knight stood guard at the castle gates, ready to defend against any threat.
His stalwart frame made him the perfect candidate for the physically demanding role of a bodyguard.
The stalwart lumberjack swung his axe with precision, chopping through the thick tree trunk in minutes.
Despite his age, the stalwart farmer continued to work the fields with the same vigor as his younger days.
The stalwart lifeguard easily pulled the struggling swimmer to safety, his strength unwavering in the rough waves.

senses.definition: extremely thin and delicate in appearance, often appearing fragile or frail

examples.x: The waiflike girl wandered through the streets, her large eyes filled with uncertainty and wonder.
Despite her waiflike appearance, she had a resilient spirit that surprised everyone who underestimated her.
The waiflike model glided down the runway, her delicate frame adding to her ethereal beauty.
He offered his coat to the waiflike figure shivering in the cold, moved by her fragile appearance.
The actress's waiflike look made her perfect for the role of the orphan in the period drama.

senses.definition: significantly enlarged or heavily muscular, typically due to intense physical exercise or bodybuilding

examples.x: After months of intense training and strict dieting, he became incredibly swole, impressing everyone at the gym.
The bodybuilder's swole arms were the result of years of dedicated weightlifting.
She worked hard in the gym every day to achieve her swole physique, turning heads wherever she went.
His friends couldn't believe how swole he had gotten since they last saw him, his muscles bulging through his shirt
The fitness influencer shared tips on how to get swole, emphasizing the importance of consistency and proper nutrition.

senses.definition: muscular or possessing well-developed physical strength

examples.x: His thewy arms were a testament to years of hard work and dedication in the gym.

senses.definition: pleasantly plump or generously proportioned in body size

examples.x: The well-upholstered gentleman enjoyed his meal, his hearty laugh filling the restaurant with joy.
Despite being well-upholstered, she moved with surprising grace and agility on the dance floor.
His well-upholstered frame made it clear that he never skipped dessert.
The well-upholstered woman wore her tailored dress with confidence, embracing her curves.
His well-upholstered physique was a result of his love for gourmet food and fine dining.
